title: Add verification module test: verify passed vs failed outcomes
Add reviewer prompt template test: validate placeholder substitution
Add engineer module test: dry-run produces expected log output
Improve error messages in projects.ts validation for missing fields
Add CLI test: --version, --help, unknown command exit codes
Add work_detection test: greenfield tasks with in_progress status should count as remaining work
Add safety module test: isBotRunning with catalogdna detection mode using fixture files for .bot-worktree, bot_status.md, and heartbeat sentinels
Add reviewer module test: parseReviewerResponse handles raw JSON, fenced JSON, JSON with surrounding prose, and malformed responses
Add state module test: atomic write safety — concurrent writes don't corrupt STATE.json (write tmp then rename)
Add audit module test: tailProgressLog formats entries correctly across multiple projects
Skip reviewer agent when diff is empty — no API call needed, log cycle_end with reason 'empty diff, no work to review' and outcome verified_weak
In cycle.ts, before running the engineer, update the bot/work branch to match the current HEAD so the bot always starts from the latest code (git branch -f bot/work HEAD)
Add --json flag to the CLI status command that outputs fleet state as JSON instead of formatted text
Add digest writer test: verify digest file is created with correct markdown format including cycle outcomes and SHA ranges
Add dispatcher test: pickNextProject respects override file (next_project.txt) and falls back to priority x staleness picker
